description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a mix of dark gray and natural wood exterior cladding. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure includes a flat roof and a spacious outdoor patio area, partially enclosed by a wooden fence and landscaped with tall, slender trees. The front of the house has a double garage and a covered entryway, while the rear opens to a private backyard with outdoor seating. The layout is spread over two stories, with the upper level set back to create a stepped profile. The overall aesthetic is clean, contemporary, and designed for urban living.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, mixed wood and dark gray exterior, large windows, and a fenced patio with landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway, and a mix of wood and dark gray cladding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long wooden facade, large windows, and the landscaped patio with tall trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, outdoor seating area, and more windows on both levels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the dark gray exterior, window arrangement, and the setback upper story.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a modern door, adjacent to a double garage, no porch or columns, minimalistic design
